case_title: GREGORY BAZELYANSKY ET AL VS. LC GENERAL ENGINEERING & CONSTRUCTION, INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,185.00 FILED BY BAZELYANSKY, GREGORY BAZELYANSKY, ELEANOR AS TO DEFENDANT LC GENERAL ENGINEERING & CONSTRUCTION, INC. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-05-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT LC GENERAL ENGINEERING & CONSTRUCTION, INC. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-05-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-05-2016 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. PLAINTIFFS WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANTS WERE PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANT LC GENERAL ENGEINEERING AND CONSTRUCTION, INC.' S EXHIBITS RETAINED. NO COSTS PER JUDGE PRO TEM LAVINE AS THERE WAS "RELATIVELY SMALL COMPARATIVE NEGLIGENCE ON LC ENGINEERING'S PART." JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-05-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BAZELYANSKY, GREGORY BAZELYANSKY, ELEANOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LC GENERAL ENGINEERING & CONSTRUCTION, INC. $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,000.00, DEFENDANT LC GENERAL ENGINEERING AND CONSTRUCTION, INC. IS PARTLY RESPONSIBLE FOR THE TREE DAMAGE DUE TO NEGLIGENT TRAFFIC DIVERSION TOO CLOSE TO THE TREE AT ISSUE. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS INDEMNIFIED BY CONTRACT WITH LC GENERAL ENGINEERING AND CONSTRUCTION INC. AND THUS OWES NOTHING. NO COSTS AWARDED PER JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE AS THERE WAS "RELATIVELY SMALL COMPARATIVE NEGLIGENCE ON DEFENDANT LC GENERAL'S PART." STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00) SERVED DEC-10-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
RETURNED MAIL: PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM MAILED CERTIFIED TO DEFENDANT MICHAEL A SOMMER RETURNED = RETURN TO SENDER, ATTEMPTED, NOT KNOWN, UNABLE TO FORWARD
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAZELYANSKY, GREGORY BAZELYANSKY, ELEANOR
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY DEFENDANT LC GENERAL ENGINEERING & CONSTRUCTION, INC. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2016 ORDERED DESTROYED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS: MICHAEL A SOMMER) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAZELYANSKY, GREGORY AS TO DEFENDANT LC GENERAL ENGINEERING & CONSTRUCTION, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $30.00) SERVED JAN-07-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LC GENERAL ENGINEERING & CONSTRUCTION, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $40.00) SERVED DEC-10-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
